response.justification: Strong 20-year engineering foundation with demonstrated breadth across software, hardware, and infrastructure, plus current AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq. However, the resume lacks the required expertise: no Master's/PhD in AI, no demonstrated AI products or platforms with recognized impact, and no evidence of director-level strategic influence over customers or teams on AI adoption. Current AI work is recent and appears early-stage. Better positioned for a senior/staff engineer role in AI infrastructure than a director-level principal engineer driving AI strategy.
strengths: 20 years of progressive engineering experience across full-stack, mobile, embedded systems, and infrastructure with proven ability to master diverse tech stacks
Current role working on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks shows trajectory toward AI expertise and real hands-on experience with emerging agentic technologies
Demonstrated entrepreneurial leadership (GISCollective founder) and strong mentoring/teaching capability (workshops, public talks, code dojos)
concerns: No Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field; limited evidence of AI/ML expertise beyond recent role—missing demonstrated AI products or platforms with strategic impact
Resume title inconsistency and no evidence of director-level individual contributor responsibilities; lacks demonstrated experience influencing strategy or advising customers on AI adoption at scale
Minimal cloud platform strategy experience; while mentions AWS CDK and Kubernetes, no evidence of cloud architecture decisions, platform design, or strategic cloud adoption guidance

key_factors.factor: Broad technical foundation and learning agility
